description_long: This is a classical-style marble bust depicting a woman with finely detailed facial features and intricately styled hair, adorned with a headband or wreath. The sculpture is broken at the top of the head, revealing a rough, unfinished edge. The bust is draped in flowing garments, with the folds of the fabric carefully carved to suggest softness and volume. The shoulders and upper chest are included, but the arms are truncated. The bust is mounted on a round, tiered pedestal base, which appears to be made of the same stone material. The overall appearance is that of a traditional Greco-Roman portrait sculpture, likely intended to convey dignity and grace.
description: A classical marble bust of a woman with detailed hair and draped garments, mounted on a round pedestal. The top of the head is broken, exposing a rough edge.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the woman's serene face, detailed hair, and draped clothing, with the broken top of the head clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the intricate hair styling and the depth of the drapery, with the facial features in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head with braided hair and the full curvature of the bust and pedestal.
description_view_3: Right rear three-quarter view emphasizing the hair's texture and the way the garment falls over the shoulder.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
